tagline.en: Fill the basket from every bed!

theme.hero_task: Fill a basket with harvest from at least 3 different beds

tasks.action: Harvest tomatoes, cucumbers, peas, and kale from Bed B

prompt.en: How many different things can you pick from this one bed?
prompt.da: Hvor mange forskellige ting kan du plukke fra dette ene bed?

prompt.en: Add strawberries to the harvest basket!
Peak summer -- water every bed every day!
prompt.da: Hoejsommer -- vand hvert bed hver dag!

tasks.action: Harvest bush beans from Bed B (first sowing ready)

prompt.en: Feel the bean pod -- when it snaps cleanly, it's ready! Pick lots!
prompt.da: Maaerk boenneskallen -- naar den knaaekker rent, er den klar! Pluk mange!

prompt.en: Cut outer leaves for tonight's salad!
prompt.da: Klip yderste blade til aftenens salat!

tasks.action: Prepare vacation watering plan for W30-W33 if going away

prompt.en: If vacation is coming, arrange neighbor watering or set up extra deep-soak before leaving.
prompt.da: Hvis ferie er paa vej, aftal nabovanding eller giv ekstra dyb vanding foer afrejse.

growth_events.event: First bush bean pods ready to harvest

prompt.en: The bean pods are hanging like green fingers! Snap one off and listen -- SNAP!
prompt.da: Boenneskulkerne haenger som groenne fingre! Knaek en af og lyt -- KNAEK!

growth_events.event: Sunflower forming flower bud at the top

prompt.en: See the big fat bud at the top? The sunflower face is forming in there!
prompt.da: Ser du den store tykke knop i toppen? Solsikkeansigtet dannes derinde!
